title: SpinRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/spin — Thunder Blessing Slot Game

playerId.description: Player UUID — must match the JWT sub claim

sessionId.description: Session identifier (format: sess-{uuid}). Provide for FG round continuation; null or omit for a new spin.

betLevel.description: Bet level index. USD valid range: 1–40. TWD valid range: 1–40. Values outside currency-specific range return INVALID_BET_LEVEL.

currency.description: Player's selected currency. Determines baseBet amount from BetRangeConfig.

extraBet.description: If true: spin cost is baseBet × 3; a Scatter symbol is guaranteed to appear in the grid.

buyFeature.description: If true: spin cost is baseBet × 100; triggers guaranteed Heads × 5 FG sequence; session floor ≥ 20× baseBet is applied.
